canonical_definition: Readability metric that estimates the U.S. school grade level required to understand a text, used to assess the comprehension difficulty of questions and answers.
papers: CondenseLM:LLMs-driven Text Dataset Condensation via Reward Matching
Investigating Value-Reasoning Reliability in Small Large Language Models

definitions.text: Readability metric that estimates the U.S. school grade level required to understand a text, used to assess the comprehension difficulty of questions and answers.
definitions.paper: CondenseLM:LLMs-driven Text Dataset Condensation via Reward Matching

definitions.text: A standardized test used to assess the linguistic complexity and ease of reading of a text, applied in this study to evaluate generated counterfactuals.
